deck:
* Dual Active Bridge (DAB) Converter - Generated by OpenMagnetics
* V1=48V, Vout=12V, Fs=100kHz, D1=0deg, D2=0deg, D3=0deg (outer), outputs=1
* L_series=57.4074uH, Lm=800uH

.model SW1 SW VT=2.5 VH=0.8 RON=0.01 ROFF=1e+06
.model DIDEAL D(IS=1.000000e-12 RS=5.000000e-02)

Vdc1 vin_dc1 0 48.000000

* Primary Full Bridge — independent leg PWMs (supports SPS/EPS/DPS/TPS)
Vpwm_p_r1 pwm_p_r1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 0.000000e+00 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_p_r2 pwm_p_r2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_p_l1 pwm_p_l1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 0.000000e+00 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_p_l2 pwm_p_l2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.000000e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)

Vq1_sense vin_dc1 q1_drain 0
Vq3_sense vin_dc1 q3_drain 0
S1 q1_drain bridge_a1 pwm_p_l1 0 SW1
D1 0 bridge_a1 DIDEAL
S2 bridge_a1 0 pwm_p_l2 0 SW1
D2 bridge_a1 q1_drain DIDEAL
S3 q3_drain bridge_b1 pwm_p_r2 0 SW1
D3 0 bridge_b1 DIDEAL
S4 bridge_b1 0 pwm_p_r1 0 SW1
D4 bridge_b1 q3_drain DIDEAL
Rsnub_q1 q1_drain bridge_a1 1000
Csnub_q1 q1_drain bridge_a1 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q2 bridge_a1 0 1000
Csnub_q2 bridge_a1 0 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q3 q3_drain bridge_b1 1000
Csnub_q3 q3_drain bridge_b1 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q4 bridge_b1 0 1000
Csnub_q4 bridge_b1 0 1.000000e-09

Vpri_sense bridge_a1 pri_out 0
Evab vab 0 pri_out bridge_b1 1

* Series inductance (leakage + external)
L_series pri_out trafo_pri 5.740741e-05

* Transformer with 1 secondary winding(s)
L_pri trafo_pri bridge_b1 8.000000e-04
L_sec_o1 trafo_sec_a_o1 bridge_sec_b_o1 5.000000e-05
K1 L_pri L_sec_o1 9.999000e-01

* Secondary bridge PWMs (D2=0.000000e+00deg)
Vpwm_s_r1 pwm_s_r1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000e+00 6.944444e-07 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_s_r2 pwm_s_r2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.694444e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_s_l1 pwm_s_l1 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 6.944444e-07 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)
Vpwm_s_l2 pwm_s_l2 0 PULSE(0 5.000000 5.694444e-06 1.000000e-08 1.000000e-08 4.800000e-06 1.000000e-05)

Vsec1_sense_o1 trafo_sec_a_o1 sec_a_o1 0
Vsec2_sense_o1 bridge_sec_b_o1 sec_b_o1 0
S5_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_a_o1 pwm_s_l1 0 SW1
D5_o1 0 sec_a_o1 DIDEAL
S6_o1 sec_a_o1 0 pwm_s_l2 0 SW1
D6_o1 sec_a_o1 vin_dc2_o1 DIDEAL
S7_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_b_o1 pwm_s_r2 0 SW1
D7_o1 0 sec_b_o1 DIDEAL
S8_o1 sec_b_o1 0 pwm_s_r1 0 SW1
D8_o1 sec_b_o1 vin_dc2_o1 DIDEAL
Rsnub_q5_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_a_o1 1000
Csnub_q5_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_a_o1 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q6_o1 sec_a_o1 0 1000
Csnub_q6_o1 sec_a_o1 0 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q7_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_b_o1 1000
Csnub_q7_o1 vin_dc2_o1 sec_b_o1 1.000000e-09
Rsnub_q8_o1 sec_b_o1 0 1000
Csnub_q8_o1 sec_b_o1 0 1.000000e-09
Resr_o1 vin_dc2_o1 vout_cap_o1 0.05
Cout_o1 vout_cap_o1 vout_neg_o1 4.700000e-05
Rload_o1 vout_cap_o1 vout_neg_o1 6.000000e+00
Vsec_sense_o1 vout_neg_o1 0 0
Bvsec_o1_diff vsec_o1_diff 0 V=V(sec_a_o1)-V(sec_b_o1)

.tran 5.000000e-08 2.401000e-02 2.400000e-02

.save v(vab) v(trafo_pri) v(bridge_b1) v(vin_dc1) i(Vpri_sense) i(Vdc1) i(Vq1_sense) i(Vq3_sense) v(sec_a_o1) v(sec_b_o1) v(vsec_o1_diff) v(vin_dc2_o1) v(vout_cap_o1) i(Vsec1_sense_o1) i(Vsec2_sense_o1) i(Vsec_sense_o1)

.options RELTOL=1.000000e-02 ABSTOL=1.000000e-07 VNTOL=1.000000e-04 ITL1=500 ITL4=500
.options METHOD=GEAR TRTOL=7.000000
.ic v(vout_cap_o1)=12.000000 v(vin_dc2_o1)=12.000000

.end
